scripts.architecture:guard: npm run lint:architecture && npm run check:eslint:touched-strict && npm run check:architecture:boundaries && npm run check:architecture:touched-strict && npm run check:architecture:ratchet && npm run check:runtime:determinism && npm run check:runtime:encoding && npm run check:editor:path-drift && npm run check:root:runtime && npm run check:architecture:metrics && npm run typecheck:architecture
scripts.app:start: npm run build:app && npm --prefix electron run start
scripts.app:package: npm run build:app && npm --prefix electron run build
scripts.mode:human: node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.husky/.bypass', '1')" && echo "Human mode active - Git hooks will be bypassed."
scripts.mode:bot: node -e "var fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('.husky/.bypass')) fs.unlinkSync('.husky/.bypass')" && echo "Bot mode active - Git hooks are enforced."
scripts.training:10h: node dev/scripts/training-loop.mjs --bridge-mode bridge --resume-checkpoint latest --resume-strict false --with-trainer-server true --stop-on-fail true --runs 100000 --duration-hours 10
scripts.training:12h:survival: node dev/scripts/training-loop.mjs --bridge-mode bridge --resume-checkpoint latest --resume-strict false --with-trainer-server true --stop-on-fail false --runs 100000 --duration-hours 12 --stage-timeout-ms 5400000 --episodes 8 --seeds 11,23,37,41,53 --modes classic-3d,classic-2d,hunt-3d,hunt-2d --max-steps 220 --runner-profile learn --inject-invalid-actions false --step-timeout-retries 1 --timeout-step-ms 220 --timeout-episode-ms 240000 --timeout-run-ms 1200000 --bridge-max-pending-acks 1024 --bridge-backpressure-threshold 768 --bridge-drop-training-when-backlogged true
scripts.training:12h:survival:ops: node dev/scripts/training-loop.mjs --bridge-mode bridge --resume-checkpoint latest --resume-strict false --with-trainer-server true --stop-on-fail true --runs 100000 --duration-hours 12 --episodes 8 --seeds 11,23,37,41,53 --modes classic-3d,classic-2d,hunt-3d,hunt-2d --max-steps 220 --runner-profile ops
scripts.training:e2e: node dev/scripts/training-e2e.mjs --bridge-mode bridge --resume-checkpoint latest --resume-strict false --with-trainer-server true
scripts.test:v28:regression: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/v28-regression.spec.js
scripts.test:fast: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/core.spec.js tests/physics-core.spec.js --timeout=240000
scripts.test:core: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/core.spec.js --timeout=240000
scripts.test:gpu: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/gpu.spec.js
scripts.test:physics: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/physics-core.spec.js tests/physics-hunt.spec.js tests/physics-policy.spec.js
scripts.test:physics:core: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/physics-core.spec.js
scripts.test:physics:hunt: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/physics-hunt.spec.js
scripts.test:physics:policy: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/physics-policy.spec.js
scripts.test:stress: node dev/scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/stress.spec.js
